description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to main, on pull requests to any branch, and on a weekly schedule. The workflow has three jobs: build, old-xarray, and no-optional-deps. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.8 and 3.10, sets up a conda environment, installs cf_xarray, runs tests with pytest, and uploads code coverage to Codecov. The old-xarray job runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.10 and xarray 2022.03.0, and performs similar steps. The no-optional-deps job runs on ubuntu-latest, sets up a conda environment without optional dependencies, installs cf_xarray, and runs tests with pytest.
